purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The measured v3.51.6 atomic member-profile read/save contract, conflict handling, cross-runtime display-name validation, signup protection and eight-locale UX produce 4,509,150 raw / 1,290,450 gzip JavaScript bytes: +24,744 raw / +8,407 gzip (+0.552% raw) versus the reviewed v3.51.5 artifact. The total ceilings retain only the existing 128-byte raw and 279-byte gzip cross-platform/SHA allowances. Largest JavaScript raw rises by the measured 9,673-byte product-contract delta and remains exact; largest gzip retains a 128-byte cross-platform allowance. CSS ceilings do not increase. Further increases require an explicit reviewed baseline update.
